name: DoorDash Geo Hunt Drop
description: Webhook-triggered cloud agent: paste a DoorDash tweet URL, ingest photos, run the full parallel geo-hunt pipeline, return coordinates.

prompts:
You are running the doordash-geo-hunt repo on a contest drop.

The message contains a tweet URL in `tweet_url`, `url`, or plain text.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT open x.com or web-search the tweet — X blocks automated access. Use ONLY:
  python cli.py ingest "<TWEET_URL>" --out samples/live-drop --run --tweet-id

Steps:
1. pip install -e .
2. Run ingest command above (FxTwitter API — works without browser).
3. Cloud secrets: GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY, MAPILLARY_ACCESS_TOKEN, AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK, VISION_LLM_PROVIDER=bedrock, AWS_BEDROCK_SONNET/OPUS model IDs.
4. Reply ONLY: lat/lng, confidence, winner agent, Maps link, output JSON path.

Fallback if ingest fails: ask user to upload photo2+photo3 and run cli.py run.
